name: az-court-docs
description: Draft and format pleadings, declarations, motions, notices, and proposed orders for Arizona courts. Applies Ariz. R. Civ. P. 10 statewide formatting; includes Maricopa County Superior Court and Pima County Superior Court specifics plus a county-courts roll-up; supports pro se workflows. Architected as matter-neutral civil-procedure skills (Ariz. R. Civ. P. civil rules, Ariz. R. Evid. evidence rules, fees and costs, local rules, citation format per the Bluebook (Arizona)) plus subject-matter bundles. The first subject-matter bundle, az-consumer-debt, covers FDCPA / Reg F / state UTPA-equivalent / chain-of-title doctrine. All workflows are skills (no slash commands) so the agent invokes them automatically from natural-language requests.
